query:
WITH active_products AS (
  SELECT id, productCode, poNumber, vendorName, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, currentStationCode, currentStatus, createdAt, updatedAt
  FROM products
  WHERE archivedAt IS NULL
), duplicate_serials AS (
  SELECT 'serialNumber' AS duplicateType, serialNumber AS duplicateValue, COUNT(*) AS duplicateCount
  FROM active_products
  WHERE serialNumber IS NOT NULL AND serialNumber <> ''
  GROUP BY serialNumber
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), duplicate_imeis AS (
  SELECT 'imei' AS duplicateType, imei AS duplicateValue, COUNT(*) AS duplicateCount
  FROM active_products
  WHERE imei IS NOT NULL AND imei <> ''
  GROUP BY imei
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT duplicateType, duplicateValue, duplicateCount
FROM duplicate_serials
UNION ALL
SELECT duplicateType, duplicateValue, duplicateCount
FROM duplicate_imeis
ORDER BY duplicateCount DESC, duplicateType, duplicateValue;
